title: aspidium mexicanum
intro: Aspidium mexicanum, also known as the Mexican polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspidium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium mexicanum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used as a tea, or they can be made into a tincture or infusion for various medicinal purposes.
